name: cxr_basic_anatomy_lung
description: Hugging Face ianpan/chest-x-ray-basic CXR anatomy model. It segments right lung, left lung, and heart; the lung wrapper returns the union of both lung labels.
architecture: tf_efficientnetv2_s encoder with U-Net decoder and multitask classification heads
weight_action: AutoModel.from_pretrained downloads ianpan/chest-x-ray-basic from Hugging Face; no GitHub weight file is required.

name: cxr_basic_anatomy_right_lung
description: Hugging Face ianpan/chest-x-ray-basic CXR anatomy model using the right-lung label.
architecture: tf_efficientnetv2_s encoder with U-Net decoder and multitask classification heads
weight_action: AutoModel.from_pretrained downloads ianpan/chest-x-ray-basic from Hugging Face; no GitHub weight file is required.

name: cxr_basic_anatomy_left_lung
description: Hugging Face ianpan/chest-x-ray-basic CXR anatomy model using the left-lung label.
architecture: tf_efficientnetv2_s encoder with U-Net decoder and multitask classification heads
weight_action: AutoModel.from_pretrained downloads ianpan/chest-x-ray-basic from Hugging Face; no GitHub weight file is required.

name: cxr_basic_anatomy_heart
description: Hugging Face ianpan/chest-x-ray-basic CXR anatomy model using the heart label.
architecture: tf_efficientnetv2_s encoder with U-Net decoder and multitask classification heads
weight_action: AutoModel.from_pretrained downloads ianpan/chest-x-ray-basic from Hugging Face; no GitHub weight file is required.

name: DIAGNijmegen_opencxr_heart_seg
description: GitHub DIAGNijmegen/opencxr Heart Segmentation algorithm. Given a PA chest X-ray, it returns a binary heart mask; AP images may work but were not trained or tested by the authors.
architecture: Keras U-Net heart segmentation model, 512x512 input, depth 6, batch normalization, SELU activation, transposed-convolution decoder, binary sigmoid output
weight_action: Install opencxr; on first use OpenCXR downloads heart_seg.h5 from the DIAGNijmegen/opencxr GitHub raw URL if the local file is missing.

name: ngaggion_HybridGNet
description: GitHub ngaggion/HybridGNet model for anatomically plausible CXR segmentation of lung and heart contours. CheXmask-Database uses HybridGNet to derive large-scale masks including ChestX-ray8/NIH images.
architecture: Hybrid CNN and graph neural network segmentation pipeline for anatomically plausible lung and heart CXR contours
weight_action: Download the official reproducibility weights from the Google Drive link in the HybridGNet README, then set a local checkpoint path for the adapter.

name: ConstantinSeibold_ChestXRayAnatomySegmentation
description: GitHub ConstantinSeibold/ChestXRayAnatomySegmentation package for fine-grained CXR anatomy segmentation and Cardio-Thoracic Ratio extraction. Default inference model is UNet_ResNet50_default trained on PAX-Ray++.
architecture: UNet_ResNet50_default multi-label CXR anatomy segmentation model
weight_action: Install cxas; its model loader downloads UNet_ResNet50_default.pth from Google Drive via gdown into the CXAS cache.

name: torchxrayvision_pspnet_lung
description: TorchXRayVision ChestX-Det PSPNet anatomical segmentation model using the left-lung and right-lung channels.
architecture: PSPNet anatomical segmentation model trained for 14 CXR structures including Left Lung, Right Lung, and Heart
weight_action: torchxrayvision downloads or loads the ChestX-Det PSPNet checkpoint into its local model cache.

name: torchxrayvision_pspnet_heart
description: TorchXRayVision ChestX-Det PSPNet anatomical segmentation model using the heart channel.
architecture: PSPNet anatomical segmentation model trained for 14 CXR structures including Heart
weight_action: torchxrayvision downloads or loads the ChestX-Det PSPNet checkpoint into its local model cache.

name: JoHof_lungmask
description: GitHub JoHof/lungmask package for automated lung segmentation in CT under severe pathologies. Provides trained U-Net models including R231, LTRCLobes, LTRCLobes_R231, and R231CovidWeb.
architecture: 2D U-Net slice-wise CT lung segmentation with optional lobe fusion
weight_action: Install lungmask and let the package resolve its trained CT model weights; add CT volume adapter before enabling selection.

name: imlab-uiip_lung-segmentation-2d
description: GitHub imlab-uiip/lung-segmentation-2d U-Net inspired Keras model for lung field segmentation on chest X-ray images. Repository includes trained_model.hdf5 trained on JSRT and Montgomery data.
weight_action: Fetch trained_model.hdf5 from the imlab-uiip/lung-segmentation-2d repository and test whether current Keras can load it; otherwise use a legacy environment.

name: imlab-uiip_lung-segmentation-3d
description: GitHub imlab-uiip/lung-segmentation-3d U-Net inspired Keras model for lung segmentation on chest 3D tomography images. Repository includes trained_model.hdf5 and trained_model_wc.hdf5 trained on private data.
architecture: 3D U-Net-inspired convolutional encoder-decoder, with optional coordinate channels
weight_action: Fetch trained_model.hdf5 or trained_model_wc.hdf5 from the repository and load it in a compatible legacy Keras/TensorFlow environment.

name: knottwill_UNet-Small
description: GitHub knottwill/UNet-Small project training a small PyTorch U-Net for lung segmentation on 12 cases from the Lung CT Segmentation Challenge. Repository stores Models/UNet_wdk24.pt.
weight_action: Fetch Models/UNet_wdk24.pt from the repository and map it to the original Small U-Net class before enabling selection.

name: rezazad68_BCDU-Net
description: GitHub rezazad68/BCDU-Net implementation of Bi-Directional ConvLSTM U-Net with densely connected convolutions. README provides a learned weight link for lung segmentation on the Lung Kaggle CT dataset.
architecture: BCDU-Net: bidirectional ConvLSTM U-Net with densely connected convolutions
weight_action: Download the lung learned weights from the Google Drive link in the BCDU-Net README and load them with a compatible Keras/TensorFlow adapter.
